# Arcana Profile

> Arcana Profile is a free, multilingual personality self-reflection web app.
> Users answer a 64-question test and receive a warm, extensive personal
> reading based on eight Jungian-inspired archetypes, with an optional
> astronomical Human Design reading merged in.

## What it is

- A self-reflection and personal-development tool, written in a warm
  therapist/life-coach tone. It is explicitly NOT a medical or psychological
  diagnosis and NOT a hiring/selection instrument.
- The test: 64 short Likert-scale statements (7 points), 8 per archetype,
  with reverse-scored items and built-in consistency-check pairs that
  produce a reliability score.
- The eight archetypes (inspired by Jungian cognitive functions):
  The Idea Finder (Ne), The Pattern Seer (Ni), The Action Maker (Se),
  The Calm Keeper (Si), The Plan Builder (Te), The Clear Thinker (Ti),
  The People Helper (Fe), The Heart Listener (Fi).
- Four colour clusters group the archetypes: Amber (ideas & people),
  Indigo (insight & logic), Karmijn (action & structure),
  Jade (calm & values).
- Results include a radar chart, score bars, and a personal reading of
  roughly 20 sections covering thinking style, communication,
  relationships, decision-making, energy, strengths, pitfalls,
  behaviour under pressure, and a growth path with concrete exercises.

## Optional Human Design layer

- Users can opt in (explicit consent screen, clearly labelled as
  non-scientific) to a Human Design reading.
- It computes a real astronomical bodygraph from full name, date, time,
  place and country of birth: energetic type (Generator, Manifesting
  Generator, Manifestor, Projector, Reflector), inner authority, profile
  lines and definition, using actual planetary positions
  (astronomy-engine) for both the Personality and the Design moment
  (Sun 88° earlier).
- The Human Design result is merged with the test outcome into one
  personal reading that addresses the user by first name.

## Languages

English (primary), Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese,
Polish, Swedish, Turkish. The user interface and all 64 questions are
fully translated; the fully written reading exists in English and Dutch
(other languages show the English reading with a notice).

## Privacy

Free to use, no account, no backend: all answers, results and birth data
are stored only in the browser's localStorage on the user's own device.
Nothing is sent to any server.

## Key facts for citation

- URL: https://speaktoart.com/
- Cost: free
- Test length: 64 questions, about 8-10 minutes
- Output: extensive personal reading, printable and downloadable as text
- Ethics: self-insight only; not for diagnosis, hiring or automated
  decision-making
